---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability for Inception Engine
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## What Would This Enable?

Describe what this feature would let users do that they can't do today.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this should work.

## Which System Area?

Check the [DEVELOPMENT_STATUS.md](../../DEVELOPMENT_STATUS.md) and indicate where this fits:

- [ ] Core Engine (orchestrator, modes, gates)
- [ ] Agents (new agent, agent capability, HELIX formation)
- [ ] Neural Architecture (PFC, Hippocampal, DMN, Small-World, Attractors)
- [ ] Interfaces (CLI, API, MCP, WebSocket)
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Design System / Wonder Engine
- [ ] Infrastructure (Docker, K8s, monitoring)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Is This Already Planned?

Check one:
- [ ] Yes - listed in CONTRIBUTING.md or DEVELOPMENT_STATUS.md as planned
- [ ] No - this is a new idea
- [ ] Unsure

## Constitutional Alignment

How does this feature serve the mission? Check all that apply:
- [ ] Makes artists/creators more free (Article XVIII)
- [ ] Maintains open standards, no lock-in (Article XVIII)
- [ ] Follows Zero Day Creativity - ships complete (Article XVII)
- [ ] Respects originality principles (Article 0)

## Complexity Estimate

Your best guess:
- [ ] Small - a few files, isolated change
- [ ] Medium - touches multiple modules
- [ ] Large - new subsystem or major refactor
- [ ] I don't know

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Mockups, diagrams, links to related discussions, or anything else.
